goal: Deliver a small, complete, deterministic Python simulation of Adeptus Testus Facility with tests, docs, CLI preview, JSON persistence, and headless rendering.

scope.subject: Sarah
scope.scenario: Default normal-day scenario starts at 8:00 AM and can advance deterministically through at least 12:00 PM.
model_requirements: Track Sarah's current room, time, needs, and movement/activity history.
Use simple documented needs including hunger, energy, morale, and health or equivalent named fields.
Bound need changes so default Sarah does not require sleep by 9:00 AM.
Make each room transition explicit enough for review through action names or history reasons.
Provide deterministic time advancement without randomness.
interface_requirements: Headless renderer includes all seven rooms and marks Sarah's current location.
JSON save/load round trip preserves relevant simulation state.
Small CLI or documented command previews/runs the simulation.

acceptance_criteria: Facility model contains exactly the seven required rooms and rejects invalid room references or invalid movement predictably.
Default normal-day scenario starts Sarah at 8:00 AM, advances deterministically through at least 12:00 PM, records explicit movement/activity reasons, and does not require sleep by 9:00 AM.
Need changes for hunger, energy, morale, and health are bounded and documented in code or README.
Headless renderer includes all seven rooms and clearly marks Sarah's current location.
JSON save/load preserves current time, current room, needs, and relevant history.
README and CLI preview instructions exist for running tests and previewing the simulation.

Automated headless pytest coverage verifies required rooms, 8:00 AM start, 9:00 AM no-sleep behavior, deterministic run through at least 12:00 PM, save/load, renderer output, invalid references, and headless pytest execution.
inputs: workflow tactical-plan and story-packet role excerpt supplied by controller
expected_outputs: Product code and tests only after approved tactical planning and story execution
Milestone validation evidence summarized for review
dependency_summary: No prior milestones. Repository is greenfield; implementation stories may inspect only focused target files named by their story packets.
non_goals: Do not build a web app, GUI, game engine, network service, database, external API, authentication, or image generation.
Do not modify installed Adeptus skill source, workflow, MCP tools, or global agent definitions.
Do not add unrelated framework abstractions, broad dependency management, or future-feature scaffolding.
Do not leave pytest caches, bytecode, or temporary validation artifacts behind.
validation_requirements: Use pytest tests that can run headlessly.
Final run evidence must include adeptus_python_compile or equivalent MCP syntax evidence if available.
Final run evidence must include adeptus_pytest(["-q"], timeout_seconds=60) or similarly bounded Adeptus MCP pytest invocation.
Final pytest evidence must state stdin: DEVNULL and did not time out.
Cleanup evidence must show no __pycache__, .pytest_cache, .pytest-tmp*, .adeptus_pytest_tmp*, *.pyc, or *.pyo remain outside protected Adeptus run artifacts.
lexmechanic_guidance: Prefer one or a few tightly bounded story packets; for a tiny greenfield project, one implementation story is acceptable if it remains a single behavioral contract.
Story acceptance criteria should stay focused and should not exceed the workflow default unless this milestone contract's acceptance criteria must be split for clarity.
Tests in each story packet must map directly to that story's acceptance criteria.
